extension.summary: Kisa kod ile Kodi repository ve plugin kurucu
Kodi repository and plugin installer from short code
extension.description: TinyURL gibi kisa adres servislerinden zip adresini cozer ve secime gore repository veya plugin eklentisini Kodi'ye kurar.
Resolves zip URLs from short URL services such as TinyURL and installs a repository or plugin add-on into Kodi.
